channel.title: ProbBrain — Polymarket Signal Feed
channel.description: Live Polymarket signals from ProbBrain: calibrated estimate vs. market price, with WIN/LOSS resolutions.

item.title: #137 Predict.fun FDV above $200M one day after launch?
item.description: Direction: NO_UNDERPRICED. Market: 79%, Ours: 40%. Confidence: HIGH. Status: PENDING. Closes: 2028-01-01.
